title: Clang expression type oracle
description: Build a libclang expression-span type map for a source file and look up expression types needed for safe temporary extraction.
status_message: Harness bridge v1: APIs delegate to reference/melee-harness-master/tools/type_oracle.py and compile_commands.json.
limitations: Requires libclang Python bindings and a compile_commands.json entry for the target source file.
Type spans are byte offsets in the current source text; after edits, rebuild the oracle.
Clang type spelling is evidence for source typing, not proof that MWCC will choose the desired code shape.

usage.agent_guidance: Use before temporary extraction or expression rewrites when the C type of a subexpression matters.
